scripts.dev:core:deps: LAB_CORE_HOST_PROJECT_ROOT=$PWD docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm deps
scripts.dev:core:up: node scripts/dev/ensure-generated-files.mjs && yarn dev:core:deps && LAB_CORE_HOST_PROJECT_ROOT=$PWD docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d backend dashboard
scripts.dev:core:logs: LAB_CORE_HOST_PROJECT_ROOT=$PWD docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f backend dashboard
scripts.dev:kernel:up: yarn dev:core:up && yarn dev:proxy && yarn dev:dns
scripts.dev:kernel:down: yarn dev:dns:down && yarn dev:proxy:down && yarn dev:core:down
scripts.dev:dns: node scripts/dev/ensure-generated-files.mjs && docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.dns.yml up -d dns
scripts.dev:proxy: node scripts/dev/ensure-generated-files.mjs && docker compose -f infra/compose/docker-compose.proxy.yml up -d proxy && node scripts/dev/refresh-proxy-networks.mjs
scripts.dev:proxy:refresh: node scripts/dev/ensure-generated-files.mjs && node scripts/dev/refresh-proxy-networks.mjs && docker restart labcore-dev-proxy-proxy-1
scripts.build: yarn workspace @lab-core/backend build && yarn workspace @lab-core/dashboard build
